name: Adjustable Bed Frame Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Turn any room into a cozy oasis with the Adjustable Bed Frame from Room Essentials™. This bed frame is made with powder-coated metal and can be adjusted to securely support varying sizes of box springs and mattresses. Supported by nine bed feet, this bed frame boasts an integrated middle support beam for extra stability. Plus, it's designed in a black hue for easy integration into any room's decor scheme.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width for queen size between side brackets: 59.5 inches
Overall Width for full size between side brackets: 53.5 inches
Overall Width for twin size between side brackets: 38.5 inches
Overall Height: 9.72 inches
Overall Depth: 74.4 inches
Distance from floor to bedframe top (the top hold spring box): 7.1 inches
Distance from adjustable bracket to end cap: 73.15 inches
